name: Prawns-in-Shell
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Coarsely Chopped Fresh Ginger Root
recipeInstructions:
Chili peppers should be hot. Take care when handling hot chili peppers.
1. Wash and devein the prawns; do not peel them. Cut the prawns diagonally into halves and place them in a medium bowl.
2. Sprinkle 1 tablespoon of white wine and grated ginger over the prawns.
3. Heat oil in a hot wok or large skillet over high heat.
4. Add the prawns to the hot oil and stir-fry until they are completely pink or red.
5. Add chopped green onions, grated fresh ginger, garlic, and chili peppers. Stir-fry only until the onions are tender.
6. Combine sugar, tomato catsup, soy sauce, remaining 1 tablespoon of white wine, and cornstarch in a small bowl.
7. Pour the mixture into the pan and cook, stirring occasionally, until the sauce thickens.
8. Serve immediately. Garnish as desired.
